name: DeepMind Mathematics Dataset
description: Generated school-level math problems for algebraic reasoning.

name: Deep Learning for Symbolic Mathematics
description: Symbolic math benchmark for tasks like symbolic integration, ODE solving, and equation manipulation.

name: Feynman Symbolic Regression Database / AI Feynman benchmark
description: Benchmark for recovering equations from data, especially physics equations.

name: SRBench / SRBench++
description: Benchmark suite for symbolic regression and equation discovery across many regression datasets.

name: LLM-SRBench
description: Benchmark for scientific equation discovery with large language models.

name: MAWPS
description: Repository of arithmetic and algebra word problems for text-to-equation tasks.

name: DRAW-1K
description: Challenging and diverse algebra word-problem dataset with broad narrative and equation-system diversity.

name: ALG514
description: Classic algebra word-problem benchmark commonly used for equation extraction and solving.

name: Dolphin18K
description: Large-scale math word-problem dataset built from Yahoo! Answers.

name: Math23K
description: Chinese math word-problem benchmark with solution expressions and answers.

name: APE210K
description: Large-scale Chinese elementary-school math word-problem dataset with equations and gold answers.

name: GSM8K
description: Grade-school math reasoning dataset with multi-step problems.

name: MATH
description: Competition-style math benchmark with full step-by-step solutions.

name: AQuA-RAT
description: Algebra word-problem dataset with natural-language rationales.

name: MathQA
description: Math word-problem dataset with operation programs for interpretable reasoning.
